AlNajm Capital PJSC — DPA Schedule & Data Export Approval (UAE PDPL / ADGM) — Ref: DPA-ONB/2026-04-77
Controller: AlNajm Capital PJSC (Trade Licence: TL-ANJ- 0O4-77Q), Processor: Desert Ledger FZ-LLC (FZ-TR   -9921); DPO: Ms. Layla Al‑Hamri, privacy@alnajm-capital.demo
Scope: PDPL personal data categories: onboarding forms (name, contact, family origin disclosures for suitability), Emirates ID surrogate token E‑0Q4  2—9Z9, masked trade‑licence images
We do not store Emirates ID images after verification; we do not log MAC addresses or device IMEI, and MNPI is expressly out of scope for this processing activity
Data minimisation: collect only last 4 digits of the Emirates ID surrogate and last 3 digits of mobile; marketing consent not pre‑ticked
Consent withdrawal: Mr. Hadi Al‑Sabri withdrew direct marketing consent on 2026‑04‑12; suppression flag set (mkt-sup: x7F9) and confirmed by email
DSAR #DS-  33  71 received 2026‑04‑15 via portal https://privacy.alnajm-capital.demo/dsar?id=Q2%2F7  1; copy provided within 30 days; rectified address per client note
Erasure executed: image hash 8a:  9c-77* of trade‑licence TL‑FZX‑9N3 cleared from the vault on 2026‑04‑18; audit log retained for accountability
Retention schedule: AML/KYC records 5 years post‑offboarding; DIFC branch HR files 6 years; we have already met the retention trigger for legacy client 7Q‑**1
Cross‑border transfer approved to Falaj Transfer Services B.S.C. (Manama) for encrypted backup hosting; PDPL Art. 23 derogation (contract necessity) applied
Transfer safeguards: SCC‑like terms executed; data residency key: UA‑  AE‑node‑A13; export manifest at https://files.alnajm-capital.demo/export?v=3&ref=onb%2F2026-0 4%2F77
Security: encryption at rest (AES‑256), role‑based access; note that completion of this DPA does not imply any unresolved breach or live risk
Regulatory context: SCA market‑abuse policy referenced; issuer‑side MNPI quarantine is already completed and unrelated to onboarding data
Contact & complaints: dpo@alnajm-capital.demo; local contact +971‑5x‑  44  88  221; complaints avenue available via freezone regulator guidance
Governance: Approval by Mr. Yousuf Al‑Badri (COO) on 2026‑04‑19; processor acceptance by Ms. Rana Qassem on 2026‑04‑20; pm/ops‑privacy backlog item closed
